highlights.text: On Wednesday at 4pm, I wrote: “ Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6592.” We broke it down Thursday, and a two day grind lower commenced into Friday’s 6390s low of day.
My general lean based purely on technicals though is that ES can try a bounce now.
The catch though, is they only occur when my core setup - the Failed Breakdown - triggers.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow

post_title: Can SPX Snap Its 5 Red Day Streak Tomorrow? March 31 Plan
